metadata.name: Handle Return of a Defective Product

description: A retailer returns a product that they claim is defective.

nodes.task_description: Receive the returned item and the RMA number.
Inspect the item to verify the defect.

expected_outcome.value: A technician confirms the product has a manufacturing defect.

nodes.task_description: Issue a full credit to the retailer.
Quarantine the defective item and notify the supplier of the quality issue.

expected_outcome.value: The item is set aside, and a quality report is sent to the original supplier.
